description: Machine source for documentation discovery, authority, lifecycle status, and generated docs/INDEX.md.

artifactTypes.roadmap: Ordered intended delivery plan, not implementation truth.
artifactTypes.specification: Testable requirements for a bounded tranche.
artifactTypes.work_order: Authority, scope ceiling, evidence, roles and stop conditions.

statusLegend.awaiting_authorization: Authored but not authorized for BUILD.
statusLegend.reference: Useful input that is not current authority.
statusLegend.generated: Generated from a machine source; do not hand-edit.
